intro: Aesculus hippocastanum liniment, also known as horse chestnut liniment, is a topical remedy often used to alleviate inflammation and pain associated with injuries and conditions such as varicose veins. The liniment typically contains extracts of Aesculus hippocastanum, a plant derived from the seeds of the horse chestnut tree, which contain anti-inflammatory compounds like aescin. When applied topically, the liniment may help reduce swelling and promote healing, providing relief from symptoms such as pain, itching, and bruising.
